policy: The engine repository is the canonical source. Sync through a reviewed script or release artifact and fail CI on unrecorded drift; never hand-rsync silently.
pluginLocalPatches: parsed-DOM/CSP authored HTML policy and CSS-only contract
model-facing path, URL, payload, frame and pixel-frame limits
remote worker readiness, bearer authentication and same-origin token download contract
MCP cancellation, wall timeouts, render slots and atomic no-clobber output publication
Hyperframes 0.7.46 HFMASK workaround by externalizing trusted CSS
pinned Puppeteer-compatible browser installer without npx
audio pad/trim duration preservation and private concat temp files
